title: Press Release 13.11.2024 [Malay-English] – Corporate Income Tax Socialisation Session
text:
SIARAN AKHBAR
KEMENTERIAN KEWANGAN DAN EKONOMI
SESI PEMBERIGAAN CUKAI PENDAPATAN KORPORAT
1. Kementerian Kewangan dan Ekonomi (MOFE) melalui Bahagian Hasil telah mengadakan Sesi
Pemberigaan Cukai Pendapatan Korporat pada hari Selasa, 12hb. November 2024 yang berlangsung
di Bilik Serbaguna 2, Tingkat 3, Island Block, MOFE.
2. Sesi ini bertujuan bagi meningkatkan kefahaman kepada syarikat mengenai pentadbiran cukai di
Negara ini serta membantu syarikat untuk meningkatkan kesedaran terhadap pematuhan Cukai
Pendapatan Korporat.
3. Sesi telah disampaikan oleh YM Dayang Nooralia Azahra binti Haji Buang, Pegawai Kewangan dari
Bahagian Hasil, MOFE yang antaranya telah menjelaskan secara menyeluruh tentang Cukai
Pendapatan Korporat termasuk Basis of Assessment, Pematuhan Cukai (Tax Obligation), Perkiraan
Cukai (Tax Computation) dan Pemfailan Cukai (Tax Filing) selaras dengan Akta Cukai Pendapatan,
Penggal 35.
-TAMAT-
Disediakan oleh:
Bahagian Hasil
Kementerian Kewangan dan Ekonomi
Emel: revenue@mofe.gov.bn
Rujukan: H/KORP/27
Tarikh: 11 Jamadilawal 1446
13 November 2024

PRESS RELEASE
MINISTRY OF FINANCE AND ECONOMY
CORPORATE INCOME TAX SOCIALISATION SESSION
1. The Revenue Division, Ministry of Finance and Economy (MOFE) held a Socialisation Session on
Corporate Income Tax on Tuesday, 12th November 2024 which took place at Bilik Serbaguna 2, Level
3, Island Block, MOFE.
2. The session hopes to spread awareness and ensure common understanding with regards to Corporate
Income Tax matters among taxpayers, and to help taxpayers to increase their level of tax compliance.
3. The session was delivered by YM Dayang Nooralia Azahra binti Haji Buang, Finance Officer at the
Revenue Division, MOFE whereby she explained the overview of Corporate Income Tax including the
Basis of Assessment, Tax Obligation, Tax Computation and Tax Filing in accordance with the Income
Tax Act, Chapter 35.
-END-
Prepared by:
Revenue Division
Ministry of Finance and Economy
Email: revenue@mofe.gov.bn
Rujukan: H/KORP/27
Tarikh: 11 Jamadilawal 1446
13 November 2024
